## The user problem

What became easier, clearer, safer or more delightful?

## The decision

What changed, and why this shape?

## Evidence

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] Keyboard path checked where relevant
- [ ] Light, dark and system theme checked where relevant
- [ ] Reduced motion/transparency checked where relevant
- [ ] Screenshots attached for visual changes
- [ ] License/provenance updated for new fonts or assets

## Honest limits

What remains unproven or deliberately out of scope?
